description: Quantum Computing, Inc. focuses on providing software tools and applications for quantum computers in Virginia. The company offers Qatalyst, a quantum application accelerator that enables developers to create and execute quantum-ready applications on conventional computers, while being ready to run on quantum computers as well as provides multiple quantum processing units including DWave, Rigetti, and IonQ. It focuses on serving commercial and government entities. The company, formerly known as Innovative Beverage Group Holdings, Inc. Quantum Computing, Inc. was founded in 2018 and is based in Leesburg, Virginia.
